name: Grilled Chicken Breast Sandwiches with Roaste
recipeIngredient: 6 chicken breast halves, without skin and boned
recipeInstructions:
STEP ONE: For the Chicken - Rub the chicken breasts with 3 tablespoons of olive oil, black pepper, and thyme. Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours, preferably overnight. Remove from refrigerator 1 hour before cooking.
STEP TWO: For the Peppers - Preheat oven to 500 degrees and place 2 red bell peppers on rack. Roast until skins are completely charred (20-30 minutes). Turn peppers occasionally for even charring. Remove skins with fingers; discard cores and seeds. Slice into 1/4-inch strips. Toss with 2 tablespoons olive oil and store in glass container until ready to use.
STEP THREE: If using charcoal, roast peppers directly on coals (tricky - watch constantly). Once evenly charred, proceed as with oven roasting. Charcoal imparts smoky flavor enhancing sandwich.
STEP FOUR: For the Sauce - Mix mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, red wine vinegar, and salt in glass container until ready to use.
STEP FIVE: Assemble Sandwiches - Grill or broil chicken 6-10 minutes per side. Brush one side of 12 bread slices with butter or olive oil. Toast lightly when cooked. Spread mustard sauce on oiled side of bread. Place sliced chicken on toasted bread, top with roasted pepper strips, tomato slices, arugula, and final slice of bread. Cut and serve immediately.
Can be served with cole slaw or Roasted Potato Salad (see recipe).
